title: viola cornuta subsp. orthoceras
intro: Viola cornuta subsp. orthoceras is a plant species also known as the purple pansy or early pansy, belonging to the violet family (Violaceae) and native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Viola cornuta subsp. orthoceras include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
